name: Apple Tart with Puff Pastry
servings: serves 8 | prep. time 10 minutes | cooking time 20-25 minutes

ingredients.item: apples, peeled, cored, and thinly sliced

method: Roll out the puff pastry into a large rectangle of ¼-inch thick. Cut out a 14-inch circle.
Spread the apricot jam almost to the edges of the circle.
Arrange the apple slices in a fan shape across the circle.
Sprinkle with the brown sugar and cinnamon.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden-brown and puffed up.
